LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT JULIA FOLLANSBEE'S DEMURRER TO THE COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF CANNOT PLEAD EITHER AN ACTIONABLE MISREPRESENTATION OR JUSTIFIABLE RELIANCE. MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. NELSON E. BRESTOFF, TEL. NO. (818) 787-4077 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT JULIA FOLLANSBEE APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;

RULING - THE MATTER WAS CALLED AT 9:40 A.M. AND THERE IS STILL NO APPEARANCE FOR THE PLAINTIFF, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT JULIA FOLLANSBEE'S DEMURRER TO THE COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND.
